1.title: Pool size
1.query:
timeseries pool_size = avg(dt.runtime.websphere.connectionpool.pool_size),
  by: { dt.entity.process_group_instance }
| fieldsAdd process_group_instance_name = entityName(dt.entity.process_group_instance)
| sort arrayAvg(pool_size) desc
| limit 20

2.title: Free pool size
2.query:
timeseries free_pool_size = avg(dt.runtime.websphere.connectionpool.free_pool_size),
  by: { dt.entity.process_group_instance }
| fieldsAdd process_group_instance_name = entityName(dt.entity.process_group_instance)
| sort arrayAvg(free_pool_size) desc
| limit 20

3.title: Percent used

| limit 20

| fieldsAdd process_group_instance_name = entityName(dt.entity.process_group_instance)

10.title: Number of requests
10.query:
timeseries requests = avg(dt.runtime.websphere.servlet.requests),
  by: { dt.entity.process_group_instance }
| fieldsAdd process_group_instance_name = entityName(dt.entity.process_group_instance)
